category_description: Configuration service reject codes: unknown keys, type/range violations, authorization, approval governance, and schema lifecycle rules.

fixtures.title: Unknown config key
fixtures.trigger_condition: An operator submits a configuration change for key 'oms.order.max_legs' which is not registered in the configuration schema.

expected_reject.message: Unknown config key 'oms.order.max_legs': not registered in configuration schema.

fixtures.remediation: Register the key in the configuration schema via a schema-update PR before setting its value; do not create ad-hoc keys.

fixtures.title: Type mismatch
fixtures.trigger_condition: An operator sets 'oms.order.timeout_ms' to the string value '5000ms' but the schema declares the type as integer.

expected_reject.message: Type mismatch for 'oms.order.timeout_ms': expected integer, got string '5000ms'.

fixtures.remediation: Provide the value as a bare integer (e.g., 5000) matching the schema-declared type.

fixtures.title: Out-of-band value
fixtures.trigger_condition: An operator sets 'oms.route.max_retries' to 100, but the schema declares the valid range as [1, 10].

expected_reject.message: Value 100 for 'oms.route.max_retries' is outside declared range [1, 10].

fixtures.remediation: Choose a value within the schema-declared range [1, 10]; request a schema range update via the config-author workflow if the range is too restrictive.

fixtures.title: Author lacks scope tag
fixtures.trigger_condition: OPERATOR-12 submits a change to the 'oms' scope but holds only #config-author-risk, not #config-author-oms.

expected_reject.message: Author OPERATOR-12 lacks #config-author-oms required to propose changes in the 'oms' scope.

fixtures.remediation: Have OPERATOR-12 granted #config-author-oms by the config admin, or reassign the change to an authorized author.

fixtures.title: Approver lacks scope tag
fixtures.trigger_condition: APPROVER-07 attempts to approve a change in the 'oms' scope but holds only #config-approver-risk.

expected_reject.message: Approver APPROVER-07 lacks #config-approver-oms required to approve changes in the 'oms' scope.

fixtures.remediation: Assign an approver who holds #config-approver-oms to review this change.

fixtures.title: Self-approval not allowed
fixtures.trigger_condition: OPERATOR-12 proposes a change and then also attempts to approve the same change as the sole approver.

expected_reject.message: Self-approval not allowed on CFG-CHG-0089: proposer and approver are both OPERATOR-12.

fixtures.remediation: Have a different qualified approver (holding #config-approver-oms) review and approve the change.

fixtures.title: Outside maintenance window
fixtures.trigger_condition: A change to 'oms.order.timeout_ms' is submitted at 14:30 UTC but the maintenance window for the OMS scope is 02:00-04:00 UTC Saturday, and no emergency override tag is present.

expected_reject.message: CFG-CHG-0090 rejected: outside maintenance window (Saturday 02:00-04:00 UTC). Apply #config-approver-window-emergency to bypass.

fixtures.remediation: Schedule the change within the maintenance window, or have an emergency-authorized approver grant #config-approver-window-emergency for urgent changes.

fixtures.title: Delete forbidden
fixtures.trigger_condition: An operator submits a DELETE operation for the registered config key 'oms.order.timeout_ms', which is not allowed — keys must be archived, not deleted.

sample_input.policy: append-only: keys must be archived with default_value, not deleted

expected_reject.message: DELETE not permitted for 'oms.order.timeout_ms': schema is append-only. Archive the key with a default_value instead.

fixtures.remediation: Set the key status to ARCHIVED and provide a default_value for replay determinism; deletion is permanently forbidden.

fixtures.title: Archive without default
fixtures.trigger_condition: An operator archives config key 'oms.order.timeout_ms' without providing a default_value, which is required for event-log replay determinism.

expected_reject.message: Cannot archive 'oms.order.timeout_ms' without a default_value: value is required for event-log replay determinism.

fixtures.remediation: Provide a default_value (e.g., the current production value) when archiving; this value will be used during historical replay after the key is removed.
